item.title: Trans Rights Are Human Rights
item.description:
Iowa right now
If the smallest group of marginalized individuals' rights are not safe, then none of our rights are safe. Currently live streams while they are still up: https://www.youtube.com/live/XHs32SseSUo?si=EN7G898wAUAagRza Outcome: https://www.nytimes.com/2025/02/27/us/iowa-transgender-civil-rights-bill.html :(
item.dc:creator: LavenderRainn

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Aunt Cass - Big Hero 6 Cosplay
item.description:
Before it happens again in the comments, yes, this is an insanely simple cosplay... That doesn't mean I put in no effort, for me it's all the small details and the vibe of the character. Despite that, this utterly blew up on Reddit yesterday to the point where old friends reached out to me to tell me they saw me on their feed... So either I nailed this cosplay despite it's simplicity, or... you all just have a thing for this character and I stumbled across something I was not prepared for :P
Reference
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Fifth Element Mondoshawan 3d print. One of my all time favorite movies!
item.description:
Still need to paint and age this print to finish it. This was printed in bronze silk PLA. The file was from here - https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:2962875
Not happy with the head. I'll probably reprint it at a different angle to get rid of those layer lines on the forehead and cheeks.

item.title: They fired one of my fav scientists :'(
item.description: This is the guy behind many popular graphs, usually with a black background. Trump and his team of .. *checks notes* ..random rich yes men, decided to gut NOAA, which tracks hurricanes, tornadoes and the like. Don't count on being told about the next Katrina. https://bsky.app/profile/zacklabe.com

item.title: My CEO ain’t on imgur, vol 2
item.description:
my direct supervisor just went from GM to VP of Operations…he ain’t on imgur either, as far as I know.
I don’t dislike my job! swear….
yes
this post isn’t entirely on topic.
anyhoo…my newly minted VP is a genuinely great guy, but a bossy boss. I was independent contractor and self employed for over a decade…not exactly subordinate 10/10 this is us.
I manage a whole department, lucky kids.
we’re in the music business, should prob mention that.
fact
so, anyway… become a venue/office dweller with a 150 emails a day has been an adjustment, and now I collect memes like … … this
too many work follows on insta not everyone likes great advice
someone might take something the wrong way
no sense of humor, some people.
they don’t need to know me that well
we always have our inboxes
so here we are.
but, my stable, salaried, venue ticketing job got me my rottie baby! ya…DO NOT EAT THE TIBETAN (aka “spicy”) FOOD YOU BEAUTIFUL MENACE!!!!
oh, we have shared offices.
heard.
most steady gig I’ve had in 20 years! ?I wanna bang on me drum all day?
topic schmopic
I sell the tickets!
fact!
my baby boy McRib at day-camp for tax
item.dc:creator: elmoreslegit

item.title: Trump is scared of AP news.
item.description: The wolves have woken to a world where rabbits won't run. Live streaming as of 2:27 pm EST https://www.youtube.com/live/XHs32SseSUo?si=EN7G898wAUAagRza EDIT: They passed it anyway. Iowa Senate OKs bill removing gender identity protections, sending change to the House https://apnews.com/article/iowa-civil-rights-code-gender-identity-cf68d2183210133b15a47e526ad2fb0d
item.dc:creator: WholeWheatBunnyHugger

item.title: The Girl from Ipanema
item.description: Carnival season in Brazil this year is from February 25th through the 28th. Tourists can enjoy performances from the various samba schools that participate in the festivities Seen here is Mayara Lima, the Rainha de Bateria of GRES Paraíso do Tuiuti, strutting her stuff. Check out more of this talented gal at https://www.instagram.com/sou_mayaralima
item.dc:creator: AkitaFuriosa

item.title: Another small PBF Dump
item.dc:creator: ameanstoanend

item.title: What Happened Today #27
item.description: Trump’s reckless firings and mass layoffs are gutting key agencies—from FEMA to Social Security—while his military purge faces backlash. Today, I contacted my senators and urged them to reject his nominations, just as past defense secretaries advised. #GovBriefToday #Resist Links 1 - https://federalnewsnetwork.com/workforce/2025/02/federal-judge-invalidates-opms-directives-to-terminate-federal-probationary-workers/ 2 - https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/feb/27/trump-noaa-cuts-climate 3 - https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2025/02/26/elon-musk-ebola-prevention-usaid-doge/ 4 - https://www.yahoo.com/news/ukraine-russia-war-live-explosions-032353345.html 5 - https://www.reuters.com/world/americas/trump-says-mexico-canada-tariffs-take-effect-march-4-2025-02-27/ 6 - https://www.nytimes.com/2025/02/27/climate/fema-trump-resignations-firings.html 7 - https://apnews.com/article/social-security-layoffs-doge-musk-trump-93efbed33957af5ec8ac37744d0592de 8 - https://www.nbcnews.com/nbc-out/out-news/transgender-troops-will-removed-military-pentagon-says-rcna194023 9 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5168446-judge-orders-trump-officials-must-testify-in-union-lawsuit-against-admin/ 10 - https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2025/02/27/trump-fbi-epa-grant-investigation/ Fighting Back: https://www.reuters.com/world/us/five-former-us-defense-secretaries-assail-trumps-military-firings-reckless-2025-02-28/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Randumbp of the day pt.1 w/sound!
item.description:
Strike!
The classic.
I have no idea.
Even if the car did an illegal lane change I hope the biker gets popped for the windshield.
With a dash of kitten.
Cheeky.
What's he sorry for, exactly? And a bonus cat tax! Never was sound on this one but it's almost ten years old and that kitty is still a hero!
item.dc:creator: LeonSpinks

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Trying to do more daily dirty posts dis week to catch up on my over 3k memes I have piled up to share. enjoy!
coffee!
office*
-.-
thank you for walking through the door with you candle lit.
I feel this fits.
boneless.
I can complicate everything. in a fun way.
am I doing it yet?
the absolute worst. let me be excited about cute sprinkles.
fuck. the forest. such a mindfuck. dont know about life changing. but such a mindfuck.
oh. forgot I had dis in dis folder too. *wheels back out since posting*
feel free. Istole them.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We had a super successful little secret santa! Thank you to everyone who participated. I learned a lot and look forward to doing it next year! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "I want to dance always, to be good and not evil, and when it is all over not to have the feeling that I might have done better." - Ruth St. Denis I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk
